results.test: POST /api/workflows - Create a signing workflow with recipients
results.curl_command:
curl -X POST \
  -H \
  "Authorization: Bearer <TOKEN>" \
  -H \
  "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -d \
  '{
  "fields": [
    {
      "x": 100,
      "y": 500,
      "page": 1,
      "width": 200,
      "height": 50,
      "field_type": "signature",
      "recipient_index": 0
    }
  ],
  "recipients": [
    {
      "signer_name": "Mia Johnson_0",
      "signer_email": "test_1776316190724_ba1255bc_0@example.com",
      "signing_order": 1
    },
    {
      "signer_name": "Olivia Smith_1",
      "signer_email": "test_1776316190724_ba1255bc_1@example.com",
      "signing_order": 2
    }
  ],
  "document_id": "6af252f7-675e-468f-a914-ad8db7a09845",
  "workflow_type": "sequential"
}' \
  "http://localhost:3002/api/workflows"
results.data_set_name: Create a signing workflow with recipients
